name: emaus-rzeszow-wordpress
description: Root scripts for Emaus Rzeszów WordPress project

scripts.install:all: npm run install:theme && npm run install:blocks && npm run install:comparison
scripts.build:all: npm run build:theme && npm run build:blocks && npm run build:comparison
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n theme,blocks,comp -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:theme" "npm run dev:blocks" "npm run dev:comparison"
